programmes.show_description: Modern western with Jason Patric and Danny Trejo. Two misfit gamblers on the run, a tenderfoot and a deadly preacher team up for a date with destiny in a boom town gone bust (2019).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Modern western with Jason Patric and Danny Trejo. Two misfit gamblers on the run, a tenderfoot and a deadly preacher team up for a date with destiny in a boom town gone bust (2019).
When Danny buys a ramshackle country cottage a local squire takes special interest in the property, going to extreme lengths to get his hands on the cottage.
Steed and Peel investigate when the ghost of a Duke is spotted in the local area. But will their initial investigation ultimately lead them to a ruthless plot?
The Avengers suspect a wild animal is responsible for a recent spate of violent deaths. Can they solve the case before a fiendish plan is unleashed?
...And Jesse James: Historic western starring Johnny Cash and Kris Kristofferson. The final years of famous outlaws, Frank and Jesse James, as a shattering event changes their path forever (1986).

Western with Randolph Scott and Claire Trevor. When the Civil War ends, a former spy heads West to start again. But as he gets mixed up in a robbery, is it too late to turn his life around? (1953)

In the wake of a valuable samurai sword's sale, old rivalries between a British prisoner and a former Japanese POW camp commandant resurface.
The Baron must piece together his life after waking with 24 hours of his memory missing.
Mannering is convinced that his old friend Louisa Trenton has been murdered and must convince the police it wasn't suicide.

In Munich in 2013 a giant haul of missing masterpieces was discovered. Cornelius Gurlitt was the man behind it and we investigate how his father's job was to purchase works for Hitler. (2014)
